vocab.word: a picture is worth a thousand words
vocab.ipa: /ə ˈpɪktʃər ɪz wɜːθ ə ˈθaʊznd wɜːdz/
vocab.meaning: một bức ảnh có giá trị thay cho ngàn lời nói
vocab.example: I gravitate towards photojournalism because I truly believe a picture is worth a thousand words when it comes to social issues.

vocab.meaning: bắt gặp ai đó lúc họ không đề phòng (chụp lén/tự nhiên)
vocab.example: My favorite portraits are those that catch people off guard, revealing their most authentic expressions.
Before I even press the shutter, I usually have the final composition already visualized in my mind's eye.

vocab.meaning: phần bổ sung làm cho mọi thứ hoàn hảo hơn
vocab.example: I take photos to document my travels, but getting a shot with perfect lighting is really the icing on the cake.

vocab.meaning: kể một câu chuyện (thường qua hình ảnh)
vocab.example: I’m fond of taking photos of weathered buildings because their textures seem to tell a tale of bygone eras.

vocab.meaning: để mắt tìm kiếm thứ gì đó
vocab.example: Whenever I wander through the city, I keep an eye out for interesting shadows and geometric patterns.

vocab.meaning: ở những nơi hẻo lánh/ít người biết đến
vocab.example: I love taking my camera off the beaten track to capture landscapes that haven't been over-photographed by tourists.

vocab.word: light at the end of the tunnel
vocab.ipa: /laɪt æt ðə end əv ðə ˈtʌnl/
vocab.meaning: ánh sáng cuối đường hầm (sử dụng ẩn dụ cho bố cục ánh sáng)
vocab.example: I enjoy playing with high-contrast silhouettes, often looking for that symbolic light at the end of the tunnel in my compositions.

vocab.meaning: đáng để thử (chơi chữ với 'shot' là cú bấm máy)
vocab.example: Even if the weather looks gloomy, taking the camera out is always worth a shot because you might capture a unique atmosphere.

vocab.meaning: người thực việc thực/bằng xương bằng thịt
vocab.example: Instead of digital avatars, I prefer photographing real flesh and blood people in their natural working environments.
